content: The 2012 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Robert J. Lefkowitz and Brian K. Kobilka for their groundbreaking work on G-protein-coupled receptors, which are crucial to understanding how cells sense and respond to external signals.
raw_content: The 2012 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Robert J. Lefkowitz and Brian K. Kobilka for their groundbreaking work on G-protein-coupled receptors, which are crucial to understanding how cells sense and respond to external signals.
